title: Black Opium Eau de Parfum
description: A floral gourmand fragrance built around an overdose of black coffee, balanced by pear accord, mandarin, vanilla, orange blossom, white flowers, cedarwood, white musk, and patchouli. The result is warm, energetic, and darkly sensual, with the black-glitter bottle reflecting its night-ready character.
descriptionHtml:
Black Opium Eau de Parfum

The original Eau de Parfum. Featuring black coffee and sensual vanilla. Addictive and energising. Over 11,500 5-star reviews. Experience YSL Black Opium, the rock couture fragrance for women by Yves Saint Laurent. Addictive, unparalleled in provocation, deliberatively seductive. Starring YSL Beauty global make-up and fragrance ambassador Zoë Kravitz.

A captivating floral gourmand scent, twisted with an overdose of black coffee, for a shot of adrenaline. Energy and sensuality married with the unique YSL edge.

Inspiration

In 1977 Yves Saint Laurent introduces Opium: a boundary-pushing perfume. Fast forward to 2014 and Yves Saint Laurent Beauty unveils Black Opium, re-inventing desire in a new, contemporary light, reshaped for the modern woman.

The Bottle

Feminine, sleek, dazzling. The Black Opium bottle is decorated with black glitter, as if dressed in sequins.

Fragrance Notes

Crafted by Marie Salamagne, Nathalie Lorson, Olivier Cresp and Honorine Blanc.

  • Top notes: Pear accord, Mandarin essence
  • Heart notes: Vanilla, Orange blossom, White flowers
  • Base notes: Black coffee accord, Cedarwood essence, White musk, Patchouli

Ingredients

ALCOHOL, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, AQUA/WATER, BENZYL SALICYLATE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL, BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE, HEXYL CINNAMAL, LIMONENE, LINALOOL, GERANIOL, CITRONELLOL, CINNAMYL ALCOHOL, METHYL ANTHRANILATE, AMYL CINNAMAL, CITRAL, COUMARIN, BENZYL BENZOATE, CI 15985/YELLOW 6, CI 17200/RED 33

Safety

CAUTION: FLAMMABLE UNTIL DRY. KEEP AWAY FROM FLAMES AND HEAT. AVOID SPRAYING IN EYES.

Featured in Layering Kits

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Dark Seduction
short_description: A rich gourmand fragrance with black coffee, creamy vanilla, and soft white florals wrapped in a dark, energetic warmth. Pear and citrus add lift, while woods and musk keep the finish smooth, sensual, and distinctly night-ready without feeling overly heavy or syrupy.

title: Libre Eau de Parfum
description: A refillable floral lavender fragrance shaped by orange blossom from Morocco, lavender from France, and a warm vanilla base. The composition is presented as the scent of freedom, with a bold contrast between bright floral notes and a softer, sensual trail.
descriptionHtml:
Libre Eau de Parfum

The iconic feminine perfume now refillable by Yves Saint Laurent. The freedom to live everything with excess. The perfume of a strong, bold and free woman experimenting her freedom extremely. The first floral lavender. The tension between the burning sensuality of an orange blossom from Morocco & the boldness of a lavender from France with a feminine twist. A warm vanilla base adds an even more sensual feeling to the scent, creating this singular trail like a breath of freedom.

The couture sharp angle bottle is twisted by a luxury oversized accessory. The iconic Cassandre logotype freely bent & nailed into the glass like a jewel. Sexy golden chains and an asymmetric black lacquered cap that tops it off. The scent of freedom.

YSL Beauty, in its Reduce Our Impact commitment, transformed LIBRE Eau de Parfum iconic bottle to become refillable. Refilling the Eau de Parfum bottle helps to save 58% glass, 59% plastics and 42% paper.

Key Notes

  • Intense Vanilla Bourbon from Madagascar — A premium vanilla caviar extract, more generous and powerful than ever, that captures the facets of the matured vanilla pod's unique scent, dipped in a liquorous captivating rhum accord.
  • Fresh Living Orange Flower from Morocco — Bright & sensuous, bringing a feminine expression to a bold & confident woman. A tribute to the house's heritage, exclusively crafted in the YSL ourika community gardens.
  • Vibrant Diva Lavender from France — A daringly bold flower expression giving a vibrant freshness to the iconic floral signature of Libre. Hand harvested in Provence and specially crafted for YSL.

Ingredients

Alcohol, Parfum / Fragrance, Aqua / Water, Limonene, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Alcohol, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Coumarin, Geraniol, Methyl Anthranilate, Citronellol, Citral, Isoeugenol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Farnesol, CI 14700 / Red 4, CI 19140 / Yellow 5, CI 60730 / Ext. Violet 2

Safety

CAUTION: FLAMMABLE UNTIL DRY. KEEP AWAY FROM FLAMES AND HEAT. AVOID SPRAYING IN EYES.

Featured in Layering Kits

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Fresh Confidence
  • Libre Bloom
short_description: A polished floral lavender with bright citrus, orange blossom, and a warm vanilla finish that feels both clean and sensual. The contrast between aromatic freshness and creamy depth gives it a confident, modern character that works easily from daytime wear into evenings without losing elegance.

title: Mon Paris Eau de Parfum
description: A modern chypre floral built around datura, white peony, red-fruity accents, white patchouli, and white musks. Pear and fruit open the scent, while the heart turns more floral and the base settles into a musky, patchouli finish. The bottle is a bold, faceted glass falcon.
descriptionHtml:
Mon Paris Eau de Parfum

Rebel hearts do declare "Je t'aime". Passionate love is essential and surrender to its vertigo is an act of audacity. It can turn Paris upside down. The original MON PARIS Eau de Parfum is a striking "Je t'aime!" declaration. The YSL Parisian femininity, both elegant and dangerous, encapsulated in a head-turning scent.

The Scent of Parisian Blooming Love

MON PARIS is a modern astounding chypre floral. A vertiginous bouquet of daturas: a mysterious flower that only reveals its precious fragrance at nightfall, one that cannot be extracted. YSL uses a patented technology to capture its olfactive snapshot and reproduce it while preserving nature. Dizzying and intoxicating, the datura is completed with aerial and elegant white peony notes; a delicious red-fruity accent; and a sensual, white patchouli essence, a special bright quality for YSL. Precious white musks finish this modern chypre signature. Hypnotic, simply irresistible.

The Bottle

One of the most iconic YSL fragrance bottle designs. A multi-faceted glass falcon both feminine and bold, distinctly modern. The lavalliere sits securely around the neck of the Mon Paris bottle, made from soft and matte silk, juxtaposed by two rock leather ties and a stylish shining gold YSL Cassandre.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Pear & Fruit — Be exhilarated with the exciting and vibrant juicy notes.
  • Heart notes: Datura & White Flowers — Feel the head-spin with the forbidden floral radiance. The signature ingredient Datura Orchid is a legendary and bewitching flower known to take on more sensuality as the night develops.
  • Base notes: Patchouli & White Musk — Lose your senses with the white musk and rotating patchouli. The reminder that love is addictive however crazy and out of control.

Safety

CAUTION: FLAMMABLE UNTIL DRY. KEEP AWAY FROM FLAMES AND HEAT. AVOID SPRAYING IN EYES.
short_description: A romantic fruity-floral with sparkling berries, pear, and citrus wrapped around luminous white flowers and soft patchouli. It feels playful, sweet, and polished, with a smooth musky finish that gives the fragrance a modern Parisian character suited to dates, evenings, and expressive everyday wear.

title: Good Girl Eau de Parfum
description: An ambery floral with almond at the top, jasmine sambac and tuberose in the heart, and tonka bean with cocoa at the base. Jasmine brings brightness, while cocoa and tonka add depth. The stiletto bottle reflects the powerful, provocative character of the scent.
descriptionHtml:
Good Girl Eau de Parfum

The sweet, alluring qualities of jasmine bring Good Girl a bright femininity. Richly fragrant cocoa and intoxicating tonka express Good Girl's mysterious side, while almond and coffee bring notes of bold vibrancy.

For: Her | She Is: Seductive & Strong | Occasion: Day & Night | Olfactive Family: Ambery Floral | The Fragrance: Powerful & Provocative

The Bottle

Combining haute couture aesthetics with technical expertise, the iconic Good Girl stiletto reflects the powerful women who inspire its silhouette.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Almond
  • Heart notes: Jasmine Sambac & Tuberose Chrystal
  • Base notes: Tonka Bean & Cocoa

Key Ingredients: Jasmine, Tuberose, Tonka Bean

Safety

short_description: A sensual amber-floral that balances creamy white florals with cocoa, tonka, almond, and coffee for a smooth sweet-dark contrast. It feels glamorous, confident, and dressed for evenings, with enough softness in the drydown to keep the richness polished rather than overpowering.

title: Very Good Girl Eau de Parfum
description: An ambery fruity woody fragrance with red currant and lychee up top, rose and lily in the heart, and vanilla bourbon with vetiver in the base. The rose note gives it a seductive center, while the red-lacquered stiletto bottle frames the composition with a vivid finish.
descriptionHtml:
Very Good Girl Eau de Parfum

Fabulous and fearless, Very Good Girl is a bold new interpretation of the iconic Good Girl scent that will walk straight into your heart with its seductive rose scent and red-hot design.

Very Good Girl takes you on a surprising olfactive journey, starting with top notes of playfully mischievous redcurrant and exotic lychee, leading to a seductive heart of rose. Vetiver and vanilla base notes provide a surprising and contemporary finish.

For: Her | She Is: Fearless & Fabulous | Occasion: Day & Night | Olfactive Family: Ambery Fruity Woody | The Fragrance: Juicy & Seductive

The Bottle

The iconic Good Girl Stiletto conquers new heights with a stunning red-lacquered interior — a signature house shade and a symbol of passion, sophistication and beauty.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Red Currant, Lychee
  • Heart notes: Rose, Lily
  • Base notes: Vanilla Bourbon, Vetiver

Key Ingredients: Red Currant, Rose & Vetiver
short_description: A bright fruity-rose fragrance with juicy red fruit, a velvety floral core, and a creamy vanilla finish softened by earthy vetiver. It feels playful, polished, and confident, offering a sweeter and more vibrant take on the original Good Girl mood without losing its evening appeal.

title: Flowerbomb Eau de Parfum
description: An ultra-feminine floral composition described as an explosion of thousands of flowers. Jasmine and rosebuds lead into peony and vanilla, while the fragrance finishes in a warm, ambery bouquet. The listed notes are peony accord, centifolia rose accord, and freesia accord.
descriptionHtml:
Flowerbomb Eau de Parfum

The explosion of thousands of flowers gives rise to an ultra-feminine, delicious fragrance. Sublime and addictive.

Flowerbomb Eau De Parfum explodes with the aroma of jasmine and rosebuds. The comforting scents of vanilla and peony perfectly complement the fragrance's delicate blossoming aromas. A warm, ambery bouquet finishes this fragrance for a delectably feminine scent that won't soon be forgotten. Perfect for anyone seeking a signature scent that radiates an explosion of 1,000 flowers.

This scent is for the graceful and romantic, who moves with an air of elegance. It captures the essence of timeless beauty and sophistication. Delicate and fresh, it resonates with individuals who seek a signature scent that mirrors their radiant spirit.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top note: Peony Accord
  • Middle note: Centifolia Rose Accord
  • Base note: Freesia Accord

Featured in Layering Kits

short_description: A lush floral gourmand with rose, jasmine, orchid, and freesia wrapped in soft vanilla, patchouli, and musk. The effect is rich, feminine, and polished, with a sweet blooming character that feels glamorous and comforting at the same time rather than sharp or overly powdery.

title: Gucci Bloom Eau de Parfum
description: A floral fragrance created to celebrate women in an authentic, vital, and expressive way. Tuberose and jasmine meet Rangoon Creeper, a flower used for the first time in perfumery, to suggest a rich garden-like character. The powder-pink lacquered bottle gives it a soft, polished finish.
descriptionHtml:
Gucci Bloom Eau de Parfum

A scent designed to celebrate the authenticity, vitality and diversity of women — flourishing in a natural, expressive and individual way. Blended by master perfumer Alberto Morillas, Gucci Bloom is created to unfold like its name, capturing the rich scent of a thriving garden filled with an abundance of flowers.

Tuberose and jasmine combine with Rangoon Creeper — a unique flower discovered in South India that is being used for the first time in perfumery — to create a rich fragrance that transports the wearer to an imaginary garden.

The Bottle

The scent is presented in a lacquered bottle, reminiscent of porcelain, in a vintage powder pink shade with a Gucci label applique.

Fragrance Notes

  • Key notes: Tuberose, Jasmine, Rangoon Creeper

short_description: A white floral fragrance that feels lush, natural, and garden-fresh, built around tuberose, jasmine, and Rangoon creeper. It wears soft yet expressive, with a blooming character that stays elegant and feminine, making it ideal for anyone who prefers florals that feel full rather than airy.

title: Daisy Eau de Toilette
description: A fresh, feminine floral bouquet with a youthful, playful character. Wild strawberry opens the scent, violet petals add softness, and gardenia with jasmine bring a luminous floral finish. The composition is presented as radiant and timeless, with a simple, bright profile.
descriptionHtml:

Inspiring. Dreamy. Playful.

Ariana Grande CLOUD is an uplifting scent that imbues a thoughtful, artistic expression of positivity and happiness from Ariana to her fans. This addictive scent opens with a dreamy blend of alluring lavender blossom, forbidden juicy pear and mouthwatering bergamot. title: J'adore Eau de Parfum
description: J'adore Eau de Parfum by DiorJ'adore Eau de Parfum, the undisputed icon of women's fragrance from the House of Dior. A true signature fragrance distinguished by its perfectly balanced floral bouquet in which no one note overshadows another, creating the sensation of a single, dreamlike flower. A legendary perfume that unfolds olfactory notes that transition from sensual to velvety, fresh or fruity.The Dream FlowerSolar ylang-ylang and velvety Damascus Rose harmonise with a precious duo of Grasse jasmine and jasmine sambac. A floral composition halfway between dream and reality, with notes that blend together in perfect balance and unveil an image of the ideal flower.A Word from the PerfumerWe usually say that J'adore is a bouquet of flowers. I would go even further: J'adore is the flower. It is made up of a complex mosaic of flowers conversing and harmonising together. Ylang-ylang, jasmine, rose, violet and lily-of-the-valley mingle to create an ideal, dreamlike flower. — Francis Kurkdjian, Perfume Creative Director, Parfums DiorFragrance Notes Key notes: Ylang-Ylang, Damascus Rose, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Jasmine Sambac
descriptionHtml:
J'adore Eau de Parfum by Dior

J'adore Eau de Parfum, the undisputed icon of women's fragrance from the House of Dior. A true signature fragrance distinguished by its perfectly balanced floral bouquet in which no one note overshadows another, creating the sensation of a single, dreamlike flower. A legendary perfume that unfolds olfactory notes that transition from sensual to velvety, fresh or fruity.

The Dream Flower

Solar ylang-ylang and velvety Damascus Rose harmonise with a precious duo of Grasse jasmine and jasmine sambac. A floral composition halfway between dream and reality, with notes that blend together in perfect balance and unveil an image of the ideal flower.

A Word from the Perfumer

We usually say that J'adore is a bouquet of flowers. I would go even further: J'adore is the flower. It is made up of a complex mosaic of flowers conversing and harmonising together. Ylang-ylang, jasmine, rose, violet and lily-of-the-valley mingle to create an ideal, dreamlike flower. — Francis Kurkdjian, Perfume Creative Director, Parfums Dior

Fragrance Notes

  • Key notes: Ylang-Ylang, Damascus Rose, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Jasmine Sambac
short_description: A luminous floral bouquet that feels smooth, radiant, and finely balanced, built around golden ylang-ylang, velvety rose, and rich jasmine. The overall impression is elegant and polished rather than sharp, making it a classic choice for someone who wants a feminine floral with lasting sophistication.

title: Miss Dior Absolutely Blooming Eau de Parfum
description: Miss Dior Absolutely Blooming Eau de ParfumBright and colorful, Miss Dior Absolutely Blooming is an extravagant floral fragrance you return to again and again. Delectable tangy Red Berry notes are embroidered on a fresh Peony accord. Exalted by a sublime duo of Grasse Rose and Damascus Rose, this infinite blooming of fresh flowers is comforted in a base of White Musk notes.   • Heart notes: Peony, Grasse Rose, Damascus Rose
  • Base notes: White Musk
short_description: A radiant fruity floral with juicy red berries, peony, and lush rose wrapped in a soft white musk glow. It feels bright, romantic, and instantly uplifting, with a playful sweetness that stays polished and feminine rather than sugary or overly delicate on the skin.

descriptionHtml:
Burberry Her Eau de Parfum

Burberry Her is a vibrant, spirited fragrance that captures the essence of London. A fruity gourmand scent that is both bold and playful, designed for the modern woman who is confident, connected and creative.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Strawberry, Raspberry, Cherry, Mandarin, Lemon

short_description: A vibrant fruity gourmand with berry brightness, soft florals, and a creamy musky finish that feels modern and easy to love. It wears playful and confident without becoming heavy, giving off a lively city energy that works well for casual days, nights out, and year-round rotation.

title: Si Passione Intense Eau de Parfum
description: Si Passione Intense Eau de Parfum by Giorgio ArmaniA floral woody fragrance that captures the vibe created when experiencing true passion. The iconic Si signature of blackcurrant nectar is blended with an emphatic floral heart made of a jasmine duo, creating a fierce and powerful energy that is rounded by a sensual and vibrant vanilla note.With blackcurrant nectar and notes of jasmine, patchouli and vanilla, this vibrant scent is for the woman who is passionate and captivating.Fragrance Notes Top notes: Blackcurrant Nectar, Mandarin, Pear Heart notes: Jasmine Duo, Rose Base notes: Patchouli, Vanilla, Cedarwood
descriptionHtml:
Si Passione Intense Eau de Parfum by Giorgio Armani

A floral woody fragrance that captures the vibe created when experiencing true passion. The iconic Si signature of blackcurrant nectar is blended with an emphatic floral heart made of a jasmine duo, creating a fierce and powerful energy that is rounded by a sensual and vibrant vanilla note.

With blackcurrant nectar and notes of jasmine, patchouli and vanilla, this vibrant scent is for the woman who is passionate and captivating.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Blackcurrant Nectar, Mandarin, Pear

  • Base notes: Patchouli, Vanilla, Cedarwood
short_description: A bold floral-woody fragrance with blackcurrant richness, luminous jasmine, and a warm vanilla-patchouli finish that feels passionate and polished. It has a sleek sensuality with enough sweetness to stay inviting, while the darker undertone gives it a dressier, more confident presence on skin.

descriptionHtml:
Coco Mademoiselle Eau de Toilette by Chanel

A strong yet surprisingly fresh, modern and warm fragrance that recalls the irrepressible spirit of a young Coco Chanel.

Top notes of Sicilian grapefruit deliver an intense freshness to the eau de toilette and give way to a floral heart with a blend of May rose and Grasse jasmine petals enriched with a fruity lychee note. Softened base notes provide a unique, boldly seductive trail.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Sicilian Grapefruit, Orange
  • Heart notes: May Rose, Grasse Jasmine, Lychee
  • Base notes: Patchouli, Vetiver, Bourbon Vanilla, White Musk
short_description: A bright citrus-patchouli fragrance with rose and soft musks that feels fresh, elegant, and effortlessly put together. It opens with a lively sparkle, then settles into a smooth refined warmth, making it an easy choice for someone who wants classic femininity with a lighter, more modern touch.

title: Born In Roma Donna Eau de Parfum
description: Born In Roma Donna Eau de Parfum by ValentinoA modern ambery fragrance inspired by Rome, a place where past and present coexist. A celebration of people living life freely while embracing their heritage. Luxuriously feminine with an edgy touch inspired by Rome's street culture today.The opulent fragrance opens with notes of one of the most luxurious ingredients in perfumery, jasmine sambac. This warm floral scent is perfect for winter and fall but will bring spice to your date nights all year.Fragrance Notes Top notes: Blackcurrant, Italian Bergamot Heart notes: Jasmine Sambac, Cashmeran Base notes: Bourbon Vanilla, Woody Notes
descriptionHtml:
Born In Roma Donna Eau de Parfum by Valentino

A modern ambery fragrance inspired by Rome, a place where past and present coexist. A celebration of people living life freely while embracing their heritage. Luxuriously feminine with an edgy touch inspired by Rome's street culture today.

The opulent fragrance opens with notes of one of the most luxurious ingredients in perfumery, jasmine sambac. The woody scent of cashmeran brings a vibrant heart, while finishing notes of vanilla bourbon bring a rich, leathery, smoky aspect with extreme sensuality.

Fragrance Family: Amber Floral. This warm floral scent is perfect for winter and fall but will bring spice to your date nights all year.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top notes: Blackcurrant, Italian Bergamot
  • Heart notes: Jasmine Sambac, Cashmeran
  • Base notes: Bourbon Vanilla, Woody Notes
short_description: A modern amber-floral with blackcurrant, jasmine, and bourbon vanilla that feels vibrant, smooth, and fashion-forward. The sweetness is creamy rather than dense, while the floral heart keeps it luminous and feminine, giving the fragrance a youthful edge that still feels polished enough for evenings.

title: Fantasy Eau de Parfum
description: A sweet fruity floral launched in 2005, opening with red lychee, golden quince, and kiwi, then moving into jasmine petals, cupcake accord, and white chocolate orchid. Creamy musk, orris root, and sensual woods shape a soft, polished finish with a distinctly feminine feel.
descriptionHtml:
Fantasy Eau de Parfum by Britney Spears

Celebrate life's possibilities with this delectably feminine fragrance. Launched in 2005, Britney Spears Fantasy blends hypnotic, fruity notes of lush red lychee, golden quince, and exotic kiwi with a sweet heart of jasmine petals and yummy cupcake accord. Traces of white chocolate orchid create a beguiling finish, while creamy musk, enchanted orris root, and sensual woods leave a tantalizing trail of embracing sensuality.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Red Lychee, Golden Quince, Exotic Kiwi
  • Heart Notes: Jasmine Petals, Cupcake Accord, White Chocolate Orchid
  • Base Notes: Creamy Musk, Orris Root, Sensual Woods

A magic love potion of sweet temptation and luscious fruits. This perfume is enveloped in a sparkling pink bottle that reflects the feminine fragrance within and Britney's playful style. An iconic affordable fragrance with a cult following — perfect for layering.

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Good Girl Fantasy
short_description: A sweet fruity gourmand with juicy lychee, quince, and kiwi layered over creamy florals and dessert-like warmth. It feels playful, nostalgic, and boldly feminine, with a candy-coated character that stays soft on skin and makes it especially appealing for fun nights and sweet fragrance lovers.

title: Chance Eau Tendre Eau de Toilette
description: A delicate fruity-floral built on citron, grapefruit, and quince, with jasmine and hyacinth at the heart and white musk, teakwood, and amber underneath. The composition stays light and poetic, with a soft green brightness and a clean, airy trail.
descriptionHtml:
Chance Eau Tendre Eau de Toilette by CHANEL

The delicate and unexpected fruity-floral fragrance for women creates a soft whirlwind of happiness, fantasy, and radiance. A green and fruity Grapefruit-Quince accord intertwines with the softness of Jasmine and the smoothness of White Musks for an intoxicatingly light, floral trail.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Citron, Grapefruit, Quince
  • Heart Notes: Jasmine, Hyacinth
  • Base Notes: White Musk, Teakwood, Amber

Fragrance Family

Fruity — Fruity Florals

Ingredients

Alcohol, Fragrance (Parfum), Water (Aqua), Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Linalool, Citronellol, Limonene, Hydroxycitronellal, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol, Benzyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, CI 60730 (Ext. Violet 2), CI 14700 (Red 4).
short_description: A delicate fruity-floral with grapefruit, quince, jasmine, and white musk that feels airy, radiant, and quietly elegant. It has a soft glowing freshness that never turns sharp, making it an easy everyday fragrance for anyone who wants something feminine, polished, and effortlessly uplifting.

title: Light Blue Eau de Toilette
description: A fresh woody-fruity fragrance shaped by Sicilian lemon, apple, and cedarwood, with white rose, jasmine, and bamboo at the heart and cedarwood, amber, and white musk in the base. It evokes Mediterranean light, sun-kissed skin, and the clean ease of Capri.
descriptionHtml:
Light Blue Eau de Toilette by Dolce&Gabbana

The sensuality of sun-kissed skin, the invigorating breeze of the Mediterranean, and the fruity and floral scents from lush vegetation — Dolce&Gabbana Light Blue captures the lightness of a day cradled by the sound of waves caressing the cliffs of Capri. Now with a new long-lasting formulation that offers up to 16 hours of wear, presented in a beautifully redesigned frosted bottle with a blue cap inspired by the traditional ceramics of the Amalfi Coast.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Sicilian Lemon, Apple, Cedarwood
  • Heart Notes: White Rose, Jasmine, Bamboo
  • Base Notes: Cedarwood, Amber, White Musk

Fragrance Family

Fresh — Fresh Citrus & Fruits

Ingredients

Alcohol Denat., Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Limonene, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Citral, Cinnamal, Linalool, Geraniol.

  • Fresh Confidence
short_description: A sparkling citrus-floral inspired by sunny Mediterranean air, fresh fruit, and clean woods. It feels crisp, breezy, and easygoing, with a bright summery character that works beautifully in warm weather and daytime wear while still keeping enough softness to feel refined rather than sporty.

title: Good Girl Gone Bad Eau de Parfum
description: A floral composition that opens with orange blossom and osmanthus, then unfolds into tuberose, jasmine, rose, gardenia, and narcissus. Amber and white musk give the scent a smooth finish, leaving it lush, airy, and built around a full bouquet of white florals.
descriptionHtml:
Good Girl Gone Bad Eau de Parfum by KILIAN Paris

A floral explosion with notes of rose, tuberose, orange blossom, and gardenia. This sweet scent incorporates the three sirens of flowers: tuberose, jasmine, and narcissus. A metaphor for Eve — the good girl that God created, who has gone bad by biting into the forbidden fruit.

The bottle can be refilled indefinitely, because as Kilian says, "True luxury should last forever." Adorned with distinctive white lacquer and meticulously engraved with the representation of Achilles' shield on each side.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Orange Blossom, Osmanthus
  • Heart Notes: Tuberose, Jasmine, Rose, Gardenia, Narcissus
  • Base Notes: Amber, White Musk

Fragrance Family

Florals — Classic Floral

Ingredients

Alcohol Denat., Fragrance (Parfum), Water/Aqua/Eau, Citronellol, Linalool, Geraniol, Farnesol, Benzyl Benzoate, Limonene, Eugenol, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Isoeugenol, Citral, Hydroxycitronellal, BHT, Benzoic Acid.
short_description: A lush white floral built around tuberose, jasmine, orange blossom, and rose with a soft sensual finish. It feels opulent, creamy, and unmistakably feminine, giving a blooming bouquet effect that is rich without turning old-fashioned, ideal for someone who wants florals with presence and softness.

title: Sauvage Eau de Parfum
description: A powerful citrus-vanilla scent with Calabrian bergamot and pepper up top, Sichuan pepper, lavender, star anise, and nutmeg in the heart, and ambroxan, vanilla absolute, patchouli, and cedar at the base. It feels deep, dry, and distinctly woody, with a strong trail.
descriptionHtml:
Sauvage Eau de Parfum by Dior

The powerful freshness of Sauvage exudes mysterious and sensual facets. Spicy and juicy bergamot brightens a trail of earthy patchouli and enveloping vanilla absolute with subtle smoky accents. An unforgettable signature that lasts all day and through the night.

Sauvage is an act of creation inspired by wide-open spaces. The Eau de Parfum represents the magic hour of the twilight in the desert, when the wolves come out. As the coolness of the thick blue night meets the burning desert air, nature exudes profound scents. The bottle features a timeless and refillable design, dense and dark like the inky night.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Pepper
  • Heart Notes: Sichuan Pepper, Lavender, Star Anise, Nutmeg
  • Base Notes: Ambroxan, Vanilla Absolute, Patchouli, Cedar

Style

Earthy, woody, warm

Ingredients

Alcohol, Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Limonene, Linalool, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Coumarin, Citronellol, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Citral, BHT, Geraniol, CI 60730 (Ext. Violet 2), Tocopherol, CI 19140 (Yellow 5), CI 14700 (Red 4), CI 42090 (Blue 1).

  • Sauvage Night
short_description: A fresh spicy amber with bergamot brightness, aromatic depth, and a smooth vanilla-wood finish that feels clean and powerful. It wears with strong projection and a modern masculine edge, balancing crisp freshness with warmth in a way that works from daytime use into late evenings.

title: Bleu de Chanel Eau de Parfum
description: An aromatic-woody fragrance with fresh citrus at the opening, followed by ginger, nutmeg, jasmine, and Iso E Super. Cedar, sandalwood, vetiver, incense, tonka bean, and vanilla give the base warmth, depth, and a clean, sensual finish with polished restraint.
descriptionHtml:
Bleu de Chanel Eau de Parfum by CHANEL

An unexpected and undeniably bold fragrance that is fresh, clean and profoundly sensual. A woody and aromatic fragrance that reveals the spirit of a man who chooses his own destiny with independence and determination — a man who defies convention.

It features a fresh citrus accord followed by ambery cedar notes. Woods are amplified by tonka bean and vanilla for heightened sensuality. New Caledonian sandalwood unfolds at the base for greater depth.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Grapefruit, Lemon, Mint, Pink Pepper
  • Heart Notes: Ginger, Iso E Super, Nutmeg, Jasmine
  • Base Notes: Cedar, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Incense, Tonka Bean, Vanilla

Style

Woody, aromatic

Featured in Layering Kits

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Date Night Power
  • Invictus Blue
short_description: A polished woody aromatic with citrus, ginger, incense, and smooth sandalwood that feels clean, confident, and versatile. It opens crisp and refined, then dries down into a richer warmth that keeps the fragrance elegant rather than loud, making it a dependable signature-style option for almost any setting.

title: Acqua di Gio Eau de Parfum
description: A marine woody scent built around marine notes and green mandarin, with sage, lavendin, and geranium in the heart and vetiver and patchouli at the base. It stays fresh, mineral, and measured, with a refillable bottle and a long-lasting marine freshness.
descriptionHtml:
Acqua di Gio Eau de Parfum by Giorgio Armani

A men's fragrance for the future that encapsulates a powerful, long-lasting marine freshness scent. Designed to meet the values of a new generation, with innovative marine fragrance notes blending with natural green mandarin, sage, vetiver, patchouli and a woody mineral dry-down. The infinite horizon of the sea captured in an innovative refill bottle.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Marine Notes, Green Mandarin
  • Heart Notes: Sage, Lavendin, Geranium
  • Base Notes: Vetiver, Patchouli

Style

Woody, aromatic

Ingredients

short_description: A fresh marine aromatic with green mandarin, herbal clarity, and mineral woods that feels airy, modern, and clean. It keeps the breezy water-inspired character of the line while adding a deeper smoother finish, making it easy to wear daily without losing sophistication or lasting presence.

title: 1 Million Eau de Toilette
description: A woody-spicy fragrance that opens with blood mandarin and peppermint, moves into rose absolute and cinnamon, and settles into leather and amber. The gold ingot bottle is part of its identity, giving the scent a bold, polished presence and a sharp edge.
descriptionHtml:
1 Million Eau de Toilette by Paco Rabanne

A daring woody and spicy men's cologne that blends blood mandarin, cinnamon and amber for a bold and irresistible scent of seduction. Encased in a sleek, high-shine gold ingot bottle that is bold, sculptural and instantly iconic, embodying power, success and unfiltered seduction.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Blood Mandarin, Peppermint
  • Heart Notes: Rose Absolute, Cinnamon
  • Base Notes: Leather, Amber

Style

Fresh, spicy

Ingredients

  • The Million Dollar Eros
short_description: A bold spicy amber with bright citrus, cinnamon warmth, and a leathery finish that feels flashy and energetic. The sweetness is smooth and club-ready, while the sharper opening keeps it lively, making it a strong pick for nights out and anyone who likes attention-grabbing masculine fragrances.

title: Eros Eau de Parfum
description: Eros Eau de Parfum opens with mandarin, lemon, litsea cubeba, elemi, and black pepper. The heart brings pomarose, geranium, lavender, and clary sage, while benzoin, cashmeran, patchouli, vanilla, and Haitian vetiver settle into a warm, woody trail. It reads as a confident, modern men’s scent with a vivid blue bottle.
descriptionHtml:
Eros Eau de Parfum by Versace

A new chapter of Eros that embodies excess and provocation. Based on the depths of Eros's woody accord of cedar, vetiver and patchouli, rekindled by the radiant, energetic light of the quintessentially Italian lemon and mandarin pairing. Enlivened with a unique note of candied apple, and decadent vanilla dares to flirt with leather in the final note.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Italian Lemon, Mandarin, Mint Oil, Candied Apple
  • Heart Notes: Geranium Flower, Clary Sage, Ambermax
  • Base Notes: Atlas Cedarwood, Virginia Cedarwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla

Style

Fresh

Ingredients

Alcohol Denat., Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Limonene, Linalool, Coumarin, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citral, Citronellol, Geraniol, Cinnamal, Eugenol.

short_description: A cool sweet aromatic with mint, crisp apple, creamy vanilla, and warm woods that feels seductive and high-impact. It carries a strong nightlife energy, but the smooth drydown keeps it wearable beyond parties, especially for anyone who enjoys bold freshness paired with rich sweetness.

title: Invictus Eau de Toilette
description: Invictus Eau de Toilette is a fresh, woody men's cologne built around grapefruit, marine accord, and guaiac wood. It is framed as the scent of victory, with a clean clash of biting freshness and woody warmth, finished by a trophy-shaped bottle.
descriptionHtml:
Invictus Eau de Toilette by Paco Rabanne

A fresh and woody men's cologne where marine accord and grapefruit collide with guaiac wood and ambergris for a high-impact fragrance of victory and lasting freshness. Encapsulated in Rabanne's signature trophy bottle, Invictus is the scent of a half-god hero.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Fresh Grapefruit, Mandarin Oranges, Marine Accord
  • Heart Notes: Bay Leaf, Hedione Jasmine
  • Base Notes: Guaiac Wood, Patchouli, Oak Moss, Ambergris

Style

Woody, aquatic

short_description: A bright aquatic fragrance with citrus sparkle, marine freshness, and an ambery finish that feels sporty, youthful, and energetic. It has a clean crowd-pleasing style with just enough sweetness underneath, making it especially easy to wear for casual days, gym-adjacent freshness, and warm-weather use.

title: Bad Boy Eau de Toilette
description: Bad Boy Eau de Toilette is built on contrast, with red and white pepper, Italian green bergamot, and sage meeting cedarwood, tonka bean, cacao, and amber wood. The result moves between bright spice and darker warmth, reflecting the house's idea of new masculinity.
descriptionHtml:
Bad Boy Eau de Toilette by Carolina Herrera

An eau de toilette that is a fragrant expression of duality, representing the bold nature of the modern man. At once strong and sensitive, confident and relaxed, the Bad Boy embraces his contrasting characteristics with assured ease. A complex journey for the senses that opens with alluring notes of black and white pepper, blended with the citric vibrancy of Italian green bergamot.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Black Pepper, White Pepper, Italian Green Bergamot, Grapefruit
  • Heart Notes: Cedarwood, Sage
  • Base Notes: Tonka Bean, Cocoa, Leather

The true secret lies in the base, with a sensual blend of tonka bean and absolutions of cocoa, resulting in a fragrance of refined masculinity with a hint of edge.

Featured in Layering Kits

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Stronger Bad Boy
short_description: A spicy amber fragrance with pepper, tonka, and cocoa facets that creates a bold sweet-dark contrast on skin. It feels playful, modern, and a little rebellious, with enough warmth to stand out at night while staying smooth and approachable rather than aggressively smoky or heavy.

title: Stronger With You Intensely Eau de Parfum
description: Stronger With You Intensely is a warm men's fragrance centered on vanilla and amber woods, with a bold pink pepper opening. The bottle's aged cognac tone reflects the fragrance's strong character and its deeper, more intense profile.
descriptionHtml:
Stronger With You Intensely Eau de Parfum by Giorgio Armani

An ambery and woody cologne for men with notes of spicy pink pepper that brings warmth and originality with notes of vanilla and lavender. A long-lasting fragrance presented in the iconic Emporio Armani glass bottle, its transparency showcasing the rich, warm amber juice within.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Pink Pepper, Cinnamon, Cardamom
  • Heart Notes: Lavender, Sage, Iris
  • Base Notes: Amberwood, Vanilla, Chestnut, Cedarwood

Fougere, woody

short_description: A warm addictive amber with chestnut sweetness, vanilla, and spiced woods that feels cozy, rich, and intensely inviting. It leans gourmand without becoming dessert-like, making it especially strong for cooler weather, evenings, and anyone who likes sweet masculine fragrances with a dense comforting trail.

title: The One Eau de Parfum
description: Dolce&Gabbana The One is described as intense yet delicate, sophisticated but naturally elegant. The women’s fragrance blends mandarin orange with rose and vanilla, balancing classic and contemporary character. Its golden flacon pays homage to the tradition of perfumery.
descriptionHtml:
The One Eau de Parfum by Dolce&Gabbana

A captivating, intense eau de parfum with woody, spicy notes that seamlessly blend elegance, style and innate magnetism. The masculine essence of this fragrance pays homage to the magnetic allure of its wearer, featuring a captivating blend of woody and spicy notes.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Ginger, Cardamom, Grapefruit, Coriander, Basil, Mandarin Orange
  • Heart Notes: Clary Sage, Bergamot, Orange Blossom, Cedar
  • Base Notes: Patchouli, Amber, Tonka Bean, Leather

Style

Woody, spicy

Ingredients

short_description: A refined amber-spicy fragrance with warm tobacco nuance, smooth woods, and a softly sensual finish. It feels mature, elegant, and understated rather than loud, offering a dressy masculine warmth that works especially well for dinners, cooler evenings, and anyone who prefers sophistication over projection.

title: La Nuit de L'Homme Eau de Toilette
description: La Nuit de L'Homme Eau de Toilette is a fresh oriental scent built on tension and contrast. Spicy bergamot opens the fragrance, followed by cedar and lavender, with vetiver in the base. The page frames it as bold and sensual at nightfall.
descriptionHtml:
La Nuit de L'Homme Eau de Toilette by YSL

A spicy and bold fragrance with a scent that lies between restraint and abandon. This long-lasting eau de toilette represents a structure of contrasting forces. Bright citrus notes of cardamom are deepened by earthy cedarwood and coumarin to create a boldly seductive scent. A date-night legend and perfect layering partner.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Cardamom, Bergamot, Lemon
  • Heart Notes: Cedarwood, Lavender
  • Base Notes: Vetiver, Caraway, Coumarin, Amber

Ingredients

Alcohol, Aqua (Water), Parfum (Fragrance), Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Linalool, Limonene, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Coumarin, Alpha-Methyl Ionone, Geraniol, Citral, Citronellol.

Featured in Layering Kits

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Dark Seduction
  • Sauvage Night
short_description: A smooth spicy woody fragrance with cardamom, lavender, and cedar that feels intimate, sleek, and effortlessly seductive. It stays softer than many nightlife scents, relying on texture and polish rather than force, which makes it especially appealing for evenings, dates, and close-range wear.

title: Dior Homme Intense Eau de Parfum
description: Like a sharply tailored Dior suit, Dior Homme Intense blends powdery iris with a sensual ambery facet and a precious cedarwood base. Dior describes it as the olfactive interpretation of modern masculinity, with a refined, assertive trail that feels elegant and composed.
descriptionHtml:
Dior Homme Intense Eau de Parfum by Dior

An olfactory interpretation of modern masculinity, thanks to the mysterious power of the rare iris pallida. Balancing the powdery softness of iris, reminiscent of coffee and chocolate, with a powerful amber patchouli base. As it melts on skin, it unfurls a long-lasting, effortlessly sexy and irresistible trail.

The iris pallida stems from an exclusive Dior partnership with a Tuscan cooperative — it takes three years of cultivation and three years of drying and distillation to obtain the rare and precious absolute.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Iris, Cardamom, Bergamot
  • Heart Notes: Iris Pallida, Cocoa, Sage, Lavender
  • Base Notes: Amber, Patchouli, Leather, Vetiver, Cedar

Style

Woody spice

Ingredients

Alcohol, Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Limonene, Linalool, Coumarin, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Citral, Geraniol, Cinnamal, Farnesol, Eugenol, Isoeugenol.
short_description: A rich powdery woody fragrance with iris, cacao, and ambery depth that feels elegant, smooth, and quietly luxurious. The texture is velvety rather than sharp, giving it a dressed-up character that suits evenings and cooler weather while still feeling controlled, refined, and highly distinctive.

title: Le Male Eau de Toilette
description: Le Male Eau de Toilette is a lavender-led fragrance with mint at the top and vanilla in the base. Jean Paul Gaultier describes it as virile and sexy, a tribute to the sailor, with the familiar note of shaving soap and a modern trail.
descriptionHtml:
Le Male Eau de Toilette by Jean Paul Gaultier

Le Male is the original cologne in the Gaultier crew, with amber-aromatic notes that evoke the familiar, comforting scent of shaving soap. A reassuring cologne with a timeless trail, blending notes of fresh mint, lavender, and sensual vanilla. Pays tribute to a symbolic figure who has long been a source of inspiration for Gaultier: the sailor.

The iconic torso-shaped bottle takes form in the symbolic garment of Gaultier's wardrobe: the striped sailor's shirt, a symbol of freedom and seduction.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Mint, Lavender, Bergamot, Cardamom
  • Heart Notes: Orange Blossom, Cinnamon, Cumin
  • Base Notes: Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood, Cedar, Amber

Style

Fresh, spicy
short_description: A classic aromatic vanilla with mint, lavender, and warm woods that feels fresh, sweet, and unmistakably masculine. It opens clean and lively before settling into a smooth comforting warmth, giving it broad appeal for everyday wear while keeping enough character to stand out from simpler fresh scents.

title: Ombre Leather Eau de Parfum
description: A warm, spicy leather fragrance that opens with cardamom, ginger, and coriander. The heart brings violet, ambrofix, patchouli, and jasmine sambac, while vanilla tincture, amber, cedarwood, and moss settle into the base. It is presented in a translucent black flacon with a faux-leather plaque.
descriptionHtml:
Ombre Leather Eau de Parfum by Tom Ford

A warm, spicy fragrance that captures the American West. Essences of fresh ginger, coriander and cardamom ignite a bold opening trail that captures a new day rising over the desert landscape. Vanilla tincture stokes a glowing leather accord — a sensual flame grounded in rich amber and honeyed woods. Packaged in a translucent black flacon with a faux-leather plaque.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Leather Accord, Cardamom, Ginger, Coriander
  • Heart Notes: Violet, Ambrofix, Patchouli, Jasmine Sambac
  • Base Notes: Vanilla Tincture, Amber, Cedarwood, Moss

Style

Warm, spicy — leather star

Ingredients

Alcohol Denat., Water/Aqua/Eau, Fragrance (Parfum), Citral, Coumarin, Geraniol, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool, BHT.

Featured in Layering Kits

  • Leather & Smoke
short_description: A warm spicy leather fragrance with cardamom, soft florals, and woody amber depth that feels rugged yet refined. It has a smooth open-air sensuality rather than a harsh smoky edge, making it a strong choice for anyone who wants leather to feel polished, modern, and easy to wear.

title: Grey Vetiver Eau de Parfum
description: A refined, fresh woody composition built around vetiver. Grapefruit, orange blossom, and sage lead into nutmeg, iris, and pimento, then vetiver, amber, oakmoss, cedarwood, and tonka bean give the base its structure. The fragrance is positioned as a modern professional scent.
descriptionHtml:
Grey Vetiver Eau de Parfum by Tom Ford

A refined and elegant fragrance that redefines vetiver for the modern professional. Clean citrus notes of grapefruit and orange blossom open into a heart of orris, nutmeg and sage, while the rich warmth of vetiver, amber and oakmoss form a distinguished, long-lasting base. The quintessential professional layering partner.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Grapefruit, Orange Blossom, Sage
  • Heart Notes: Nutmeg, Iris, Pimento
  • Base Notes: Vetiver, Amber, Oakmoss, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean

Style

Fresh, woody — professional layering partner

Featured in Layering Kits

This fragrance is used in curated Layer combo products for shoppers who want a ready-made pairing.

  • Professional Powerhouse
short_description: A crisp citrus-vetiver fragrance with clean woods and subtle spice that feels tailored, dry, and quietly sophisticated. It wears fresh without becoming casual, offering a smooth professional character that suits office settings, daytime use, and anyone who prefers understated elegance over sweetness or weight.

title: Legend Blue Eau de Parfum
description: A woody, aromatic fragrance shaped around contrast and freshness. Bergamot, spearmint, and lemon zest open the scent, followed by violet, lavender, and a woody accord. Ambroxan, oud, cedarwood, and musk anchor the base in a clean, modern profile, giving it a polished blue-scent character.
descriptionHtml:
Legend Blue Eau de Parfum by Montblanc

A woody, aromatic fragrance that reflects the facets of the Legend Blue man: full of contrasts, balancing freshness, authenticity, success and strength. An affordable blue scent that is versatile for layering with notes of bergamot, violet, and oud creating a modern, clean profile.

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Bergamot, Spearmint, Lemon Zest
  • Heart Notes: Violet, Lavender, Woody Accord
  • Base Notes: Ambroxan, Oud, Cedarwood, Musk

Style

Woody, aromatic

Ingredients

Alcohol Denat., Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Limonene, Linalool, Coumarin, Citronellol, Geraniol, Isoeugenol, Citral.
short_description: A fresh woody aromatic with bright lift, smooth lavender facets, and clean musky woods that feel relaxed and modern. It stays easygoing and versatile throughout wear, making it a reliable everyday option for someone who wants a polished masculine scent that is fresh, approachable, and uncomplicated.

title: Club de Nuit Intense Eau de Toilette
description: A woody-spicy fragrance for men and a 2015 launch. Pineapple, bergamot, lemon, apple, and black currant open the scent; jasmine, rose, and birch form the heart; vanilla, patchouli, ambergris, and musk ground the base, alongside saffron, pepper, violet, and agarwood.
descriptionHtml:
Club de Nuit Intense Eau de Toilette by Armaf

A powerful woody-spicy fragrance for men and the best-selling Aventus alternative. Launched in 2015, this scent features notes of pineapple, bergamot, lemon, apple and black currant at the top.
